calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2023 Off Calendar

Declaration In Support Of Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-15-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for application for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:17:43 a.m. and concluding at 10:26:06 a.m.

Plaintiff Old Republic National Title Insurance Company represented by E. Richard McGuire, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Da Qiang (Jony) Tan not appearing.
Defendant Yen Mindy Tiet not appearing.

LISA LEE is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Court has reviewed the case and all filings pertaining to this hearing.
Counsel for Plaintiff presents outline, summary of case, and an offer of proof.

LISA LEE is examined by the Court. Witness attests that statements made by its counsel are true and correct.

The matter is submitted.
Based on the summary of the case, comments made by Plaintiff's Counsel, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has proven each essential element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Old Republic National Title Insurance Company, and against Defendants Da Qiang (Jony) Tan and Yen Mindy Tiet, as follows:

Plaintiff's request for pre-judgment interest is DENIED.

1. Damages: $401,746.99
2. Costs: $663.69

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $402,410.68

Proposed judgment signed as modified.

Declaration In Support Of Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-17-2023 Continued To Feb-15-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 514; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Not Recorded

Plaintiff Old Republic National Title Insurance Company represented by E. Richard McGuire, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Da Qiang (Jony) Tan not appearing.

Plaintiff's witness is not available.
Court orders matter continued to Feb-15-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 505 pursuant to the request of Plaintiff and further hearing on request for entry of default judgment.
